mapper.select: SELECT id, role_name, description FROM roles ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT id, role_name, description FROM roles WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, parent_id, menu_key, menu_name, path, sort_order, is_enabled FROM menus WHERE is_enabled = 1 ORDER BY COALESCE(parent_id, id), sort_order, id
SELECT menu_id FROM role_menus WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND can_access = 1 ORDER BY menu_id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO role_menus (role_id, menu_id, can_access, granted_at) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{menuId}, 1, NOW(6)) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE can_access = 1
